issues.description: Text states '[Rush] during this turn' which indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. These are mechanically different: DuringYourTurn means the effect lasts only while it is your turn, whereas EndOfTurn means it expires at end of turn but persists if somehow your turn isn't ending yet.

Missing optional cost condition: 'You may return 1 or more DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck' is a required precondition for the effect to trigger. This should be represented as a condition or cost structure that is not currently modeled.
Rest action should include optional modifier: 'up to 1' means the player may choose to rest 0 or 1 opponent character, but current DSL does not indicate this is optional.
